name: Holdout / Calibration Set
description: Reserved subset for cleaner cross-model comparison and future public reporting. Disjoint from the starter slice; never used during iteration on prompt or scoring tweaks.
selection_rationale: Picks the trailing two cases from each family so the starter slice can evolve at the head of the dataset without colliding with reserved evaluation cases. Goal-grounding (GG-07, GG-08), classic-riddle override (CR-07, CR-08), temporal-state (TW-07, TW-08), and pronoun-resolution (PR-06, PR-07) take their last two entries. Social-pragmatic uses SP-08, SP-09 and physical-commonsense uses MC-09, MC-10. Instruction-ambiguity reserves IA-49 and IA-50 to keep the largest family represented without overweighting it.
